message:
fix: Always disable AVX-512 in libdeflate to fix CI builds

The conditional check `target.query.cpu_model == .native` doesn't work
correctly on CI - the default target is native, but CI runners may not
have proper AVX-512 codegen support, causing evex512 compile errors.

libdeflate has runtime CPU detection and will use AVX2/SSE fallbacks
automatically, so disabling AVX-512 at compile time has no performance
impact at runtime.
